title: best herbal teas for inflammation
description: Rheum officinale tea contains bioactive constituents such as flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins, which are responsible for its anti-inflammatory properties and ability to treat inflammation-related ailments. This herbal tea has analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in reducing inflammation and alleviating pain.
